other_observers: Seen with the finder Paul Tennery, also Mark Peterson, Kathy Mihm-Dunning and Jeff Dunning.  It was seen by many others through Sunday, 6/28/2015.  It was found the day before, Wednesday 06/24/2015.
specific_location: South of the town of Valdez
description: Mark Peterson and I went to see this bird.  When we arrive, we quickly saw the bird, and saw it for nearly an hour.  Getting nice looks and photos, of a hummingbird with pink head and throat, and very gray underparts.  See photos.  Nothing looks like an adult male Anna's Hummingbird.
photographer: Photographer: Brandon K. Percival, Brandon K. Percival, Brandon K. Percival, Brandon K. Percival
